statement: Sub-0.80 recall at 1 at 10-session depth on the multi_session_coherence suite is a property of the task harness rather than of memory systems: a no-memory control that pastes the full prior-session transcript into context within the same 30k-token budget also scores below 0.80 mean recall at 1
falsification_criteria: If the no-memory full-context control achieves mean recall@1 >= 0.80 (N>=10 runs, 95% bootstrap CI lower bound >= 0.80) on multi_session_coherence at 10-session depth, this claim is falsified: the harness can discriminate, and a universal memory-system failure is a finding about the systems rather than about the task.
